name: North Point Financial Inc. / Gallegos MRI
description_short: North Point Financial (GALLEGOS) is a Colorado mortgage brokerage offering home loans, real estate, and insurance under one roof. NMLS #1753343.
description_long:
North Point Financial Inc., operating publicly under the GALLEGOS brand, is a family-run mortgage brokerage headquartered at 4321 E 109th Ave in Thornton, Colorado. Founded approximately in 2010 and in business for over a decade, the company is led by Joel Gallegos (NMLS #306950), who brings 14+ years of mortgage industry experience. The firm holds company NMLS license #1753343 and is staffed by multiple licensed members of the Gallegos family, including Jeremiah Gallegos (co-owner of affiliated Gallegos Agency Inc. / Farmers Insurance) and Josiah Gallegos, a licensed notary signing agent. The company serves the greater Denver metro area and Colorado broadly.

North Point Financial operates as a true mortgage broker — not a direct lender — offering access to a wide range of home loan products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, jumbo loans, reverse mortgages, fixed-rate mortgages, and refinancing. Beyond mortgages, the firm distinguishes itself by also providing licensed real estate services (buying, selling, and investing) and insurance products through its Farmers Insurance affiliation, covering home, auto, business, and life insurance. This makes GALLEGOS a rare three-service shop: Mortgage, Real estate, and Insurance (the likely meaning of the "MRI" branding).

The company's core differentiator is its broker model, which it markets directly: "We are brokers, we are better — better service, better pricing." Rather than being captive to one lender's products, North Point Financial shops multiple wholesale lenders on behalf of clients to find competitive rates and terms. Its multi-generational family structure and local Colorado focus reinforce a personalized service model. On Google, the business holds a 5.0-star rating from 97 reviews, and Facebook also shows 5.0 stars from 30 reviews — a consistently strong local reputation across platforms.

North Point Financial is a compelling option for Colorado borrowers who want a one-stop relationship for mortgage, real estate, and insurance — particularly those eligible for government-backed loans like VA or USDA programs. However, prospective clients should note several real limitations: the company serves Colorado only, no online client portal or loan-tracking platform has been confirmed, and specific fee schedules or rate sheets are not publicly disclosed (as is common with broker models). BBB accreditation status is also unconfirmed. For borrowers prioritizing local expertise and bundled services over digital self-service tools, GALLEGOS is worth a direct consultation.
pros: Broker model allows shopping multiple wholesale lenders for competitive mortgage rates, not locked into one product
Joel Gallegos holds NMLS #306950 with 14+ years of mortgage industry experience
Three services under one roof: mortgage brokerage, licensed real estate, and Farmers Insurance
Multi-generational family team (Joel, Jeremiah, Josiah Gallegos) with in-house notary signing agent
5.0-star Google rating from 97 reviews and 5.0-star Facebook rating from 30 reviews
Full range of government and conventional loan types: FHA, VA, USDA, Jumbo, Conventional, Reverse
Farmers Insurance affiliation enables bundled home, auto, life, and business insurance at closing
cons: Colorado-only operation — not available to borrowers outside the state
No confirmed online client portal or digital loan-tracking tools for borrowers
Rate sheets and fee schedules not publicly disclosed; requires direct contact for any pricing information
BBB accreditation status and letter grade could not be independently verified
Exact founding year and full licensing history not verifiable from public sources
best_for: Colorado homebuyers seeking purchase financing across multiple loan program types (FHA, VA, USDA, Conventional)
Colorado veterans and active-duty military eligible for VA loans in the Denver/Thornton metro area
Buyers wanting mortgage origination, real estate agent services, and insurance bundled through one local family firm
Homeowners in Colorado looking to refinance and prefer broker access to multiple lenders over a single bank
diagnosis: North Point Financial Inc. (GALLEGOS) is best suited for Colorado-based homebuyers, refinancers, and investors who value a locally-rooted, family-run mortgage broker that can also handle real estate and insurance needs in a single relationship. The broker model is a genuine advantage — they shop multiple lenders rather than pushing one institution's products. The main caveat is that this is a boutique, Colorado-only operation with no confirmed digital tools for self-service borrowers, and all pricing must be obtained through direct consultation.
services: Real estate seller services and investment property
Home, auto, business, and life insurance (via Farmers Insurance affiliation)
